verses.text: Jerusalem khuanai, Bethfage khua a omna Oliv Mual a tun' uh ciangin Jesuh in a nungzuite nih ma sawl a
“Mai-a a om khua-ah va pai un. Na tun' uh ciangin la nuta khau a kikhih na mu ding uh hi. Hong sut un la hong kai un
Mi khatpeuh in hong paupih leh, ‘Topa in deih hi,’ ci le uh cin hong paisak pah ding hi,” ci-in a vaikhak hi
Hih thu pen kamsangpa' thugenna a tun'na dingin a piang ahi hi
Tua a genna-ah, “En un, na kumpipa uh hong pai hi. Kiniamkhiatna tawh lapi tung leh lano tungah tuangin hong pai hi, ci-in Zion khuamite kiangah gen un,” a ci hi
Nungzuite gel zong Jesuh sawl bangin va pai uh hi
Amaute in a la nuta hong paipih uh a, a tungah a puante uh a phah khit uh ciangin Jesuh a tuang hi
Mihon tampite in ama paina ding lampi-ah a puante uh na phah uh a, adangte in nisuh hiangte satin lampi-ah a na phah uh hi

A mai-a pai mihonte leh a nunga zui mihonte awng uh a, “David' suan Jesuh in phatna ngah ta hen! Topa' min tawh hong paipa in thupha ngah ta hen! A sangpena om Pasian in phatna ngah ta hen!” a ci uh hi
Jerusalem khuasung a tun' uh ciangin khuasung mi khempeuh gamlum henhan uh a, “Hihpa kua ahi hiam?” ci-in khatlekhat a kidong uh hi
Mihonpite in, “Galilee gam Nazareth khua pana kamsang Jesuh hi,” ci-in a dawng uh hi.
Tua ciangin Pasian biakna innpi huang sungah Jesuh lut a, tua sungah van zuak van lei-a a om mi khempeuh a hawlkhia hi. Sumkhek nasemin a om mite' sabuai leh vakhu zuakte' tutnate a lumletsak gawp hi
Amaute kiangah, “Pasian in Lai Siangtho sungah, ‘Ka inn pen thungetna inn kici ding hi,’ ci napi-in, note in guktakna phualpi na suaksak uh hi,” a ci hi
Biakinn sung Jesuh kiangah mittawte leh khebaite hong pai uh a, amah in amaute a damsak hi
Ahi zongin siampi liante leh Thukham hilh siate in a na lamdang bawlte mu-in, biakinn sungah naupangte in, “David' suan Jesuh in phatna ngah ta hen!” ci-in a kikona a zak uh ciangin heh uh ahih manin

Jesuh kiangah, “Hih naupangte' otna na za hiam?” ci-in a dong uh hi. Jesuh in, “Ka za hi. Lai Siangtho sungah, ‘Naungekte leh naupangte' kam tawh a cingtaak phatna na gen sak hi,’ a cihna thu sim ngeilo na hi uh hiam?” ci-in a dawng hi
Tua ciangin Jesuh in amaute nusia a, khuapi sung pan paikhia-in Bethany khua-ah a giak hi.
A zingsang ciangin khuapi zuanin hong paikik laitakin Jesuh a gil a kial hi
Lam gei-ah theikung khat mu ahih manin a gei-ah va pai a, ahi zongin a teh simloh bangmah a mu kei hi. Jesuh in tua theikung kiangah, “Gah ngei nawn kei in!” a cih khit phetin a theikung a sipah hi
Nungzuite in a muh uh ciangin lamdangsa uh ahih manin, “Bang hangin theikung tuaci sihpah ahi hiam?” a cih uh ciangin

Jesuh in, “Note kiangah a mantaka kong genin-ah: Note in uplahna nei hetloin, upna taktak na neih nak uh leh hih theikung tungah a piang bang na hih theih uh banah, hih mual kiang nangawnah, ‘Na omna pan paikhia-in tuipi sung kiden'na in,’ ci le uh cin na cih bangun piang ding hi
Upna na neih nak uh leh na nget peuhpeuh uh na ngah ding uh hi,” a ci hi.

Biakinn tual sungah Jesuh lutkik a, thuhilhin a om laitakin siampi liante leh upate ama kiangah hong pai uh a, “Hih nate kua thu tawh bawl a, na bawlna ding kua in aana hong pia ahi hiam?” ci-in a dot uh ciangin
Jesuh in, “Kei zong thu khat kong dong masa ding hi. Na hong dawn' nak uh leh kei zong kua thu tawh bawl cih ka hong gen ding hi

Johan in tuiphum theihna ding thu koi lai panin ngah ahi hiam? Pasian kiang panin thu ngah ahi hiam, ahih kei leh mihingte kiang panin thu ngah ahi hiam?” a ci hi. Amaute khatlekhat kiseel uh a, “Pasian kiang pan hi,” ci lehang, “Bang hangin umlo na hi uh hiam?” hong ci ding hi
Ahi zongin, “Mihingte kiang pan hi,” ci leuleu lehang, mi khempeuh in Johan pen kamsang hi, ci-in ngaihsun uh ahih manin mihonte i kihta zel hi, kici uh hi
Tua ahih ciangin Jesuh kiangah, “Ka thei kei uh hi,” ci-in a dawng uh hi. Jesuh in zong amaute kiangah, “Kei zong hih nate, kua thu tawh ka bawl cih ka hong gen kei ding hi,” a ci hi.
Tua ciangin Jesuh in amaute kiangah, “Note in bangci ngaihsut na hi uh hiam? Mi khat in tapa nih nei hi. A ta uzaw kiangah, ‘Ka ta aw, tuni-in leenggah lo-ah va kuan in,’ ci-in a sawl ciangin
amah in, ‘Kuan nuam kei ing,’ ci napi-in a lungsim kikheelin a kuankik hi
Tua ciangin a ta nauzaw kiangah tua mah bangin va ci a, ‘Pa aw, va kuan mah ning,’ ci napi-in a kuan kei hi

Hih tapa nihte sung panin a koi bel pen a pa' deih bangin gamta ahi hiam?” a ci hi. Amaute in, “A ta uzaw a ta hi,” a ci uh hi. Tua ciangin Jesuh in amaute kiangah, “Note kiangah a mantaka kong genin-ah: Pasian' ukna sungah note sangin siahdongte leh numei paktatte lut masazaw ding hi

Bang hang hiam cih leh note kiangah Tuiphumpa Johan hong pai-in thuman lampi hong lak napi-in na um kei uh a, ahi zongin siahdongte leh numei paktatte in a um uh hi. Hih thu na theih khit uh ciang nangawnin na lungsim uh na kheel nuam tuan kei uh a, na um kei veve uh hi.

sections.sectionTitle: Leenggah Lo leh A Khote Thugentehna

verses.text: “Thugentehna dang khat na ngai lai un. Mi khat in lo zuanin leenggui suan a, a kimkot umin, leenggah cilna ding bawl a, a hon'na ding tausang khat a lam khit ciangin lo khawhlawhte khawhlawh sakin gamdangah a pai hi
Leenggah min hun a tun' ciangin ama ngahding teng a va la dingin lo khawhlawhte kiangah a nasemte a paisak hi
Lo khawhlawhte in a nasemte na manin khat na satgawp uh a, khat na thatin, khat suang tawh na denggawp uh hi
Tua ciangin lo neipa in a masa-a sangin nasem a tamzaw va paisak leuleu a, ahi zongin a masa-a mah bangin a nasemte a na bawlsia veve uh hi
Tua khit ciangin ka tapa paisak leng na zahtak ding uh hi, ci-in ngaihsun ahih manin a tapa a paisak hi
Ahi zongin lo khawhlawhte in a tapa a muh uh ciangin, ‘Hihpa pen a gamhluah dingpa ahi hi. Hong pai un; amah thatin a luah dingteng eite in la ni,’ a kici uh hi
Tua ahih manin amah manin that uh a, lo nawlah a paai uh hi
Tua ahih ciangin leenggah lo neipa hong pai ciangin a lo khawhlawhte bangci bawl ding ahi hiam?” ci-in a dong hi
Amaute in, “Tua migilote thatgawp ding a, a hun hunin leenggah a pia ding lo khawhlawh dangte khosak ding hi,” a ci uh hi

Jesuh in amaute kiangah, “Lai Siangtho sungah, ‘Innlamte in a nilkhiat suang pen innkiu suang bulpi suak khinta hi. Hih pen Topa' bawl hi a, i muh ciangin lamdang i sa hi,’ ci-in a kigelhna sim ngeilo na hi uh hiam
Tua ahih ciangin note kiangah kong genin-ah: Note pen Pasian hong ki-uksak nawnlo ding a, a kilawmin a gamta ding mite bek Pasian in uk ding hi
Hih suang tungah a kia mi khempeuh kizan gawp ding a, mi khat peuh tungah tua suang a kiat leh zong dengzan gawp ding hi,” a ci hi
Siampi liante leh Farisi mite in hih thugentehna a zak uh ciangin amaute a cihnopna-in a gen ahihlam a phawk uh hi
Jesuh a man dingin kithawi uh a, ahi zongin mihonte in kamsang khatin ngaihsun uh ahih manin mihonte a kihtak manun a man ngam kei uh hi.
